nasb.text: Why do you look at the speck that is in your brother’s eye, but do not notice the log that is in your own eye?

esv.text: Why do you see the speck that is in your brother’s eye, but do not notice the log that is in your own eye?

cnv.text: 為甚麼看得見你弟兄眼中的木屑，卻想不到自己眼中的梁木呢？

ccb.text: 为什么你只看见你弟兄眼中的小刺，却看不见自己眼中的大梁呢？

csbs.text: “你为什么看见你弟兄眼里的木屑，却不想自己眼里的梁木呢？
